inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age at which you plan to retire

inputs.label: Employee Contribution Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of salary you contribute to 401k

inputs.label: Employer Match Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of salary your employer matches

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual rate of return on investments

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inflation rate affecting salary increases

formulas.futureValue: (expectedReturnRate === inflationRate) ? (currentBalance * Math.pow(1 + expectedReturnRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge) + currentSalary * (contributionRate/100 + employerMatchRate/100) * (retirementAge - currentAge) * Math.pow(1 + expectedReturnRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge - 1)) : (currentBalance * Math.pow(1 + expectedReturnRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge) + currentSalary * (contributionRate/100 + employerMatchRate/100) * (Math.pow(1 + expectedReturnRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge) - Math.pow(1 + inflationRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge)) / ((expectedReturnRate/100) - (inflationRate/100)))
formulas.totalEmployeeContributions: (inflationRate === 0) ? currentSalary * (contributionRate/100) * (retirementAge - currentAge) : currentSalary * (contributionRate/100) * (Math.pow(1 + inflationRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge) - 1) / (inflationRate/100)
formulas.totalEmployerContributions: (inflationRate === 0) ? currentSalary * (employerMatchRate/100) * (retirementAge - currentAge) : currentSalary * (employerMatchRate/100) * (Math.pow(1 + inflationRate/100, retirementAge - currentAge) - 1) / (inflationRate/100)
